positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a group of woodland animals (fox, badger, rabbit) having a picnic in a lush, magical forest. Use soft pastel colors, detailed watercolor textures, and a gentle, hand-drawn style. Cinematic lighting, high detail, concept art, Greg Rutkowski and Beatrix Potter influences.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, harsh lines, graffiti
